feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: So, the Middle East is poor except Qatar, Malaysia, one of the richest countries…
entry.content: So, the Middle East is poor except Qatar, Malaysia, one of the richest countries in Southeast Asia, is only on the level of China. On the contrary, it is great that a large population in China has that kind of income.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: 'bum on tum
entry.content: Thought I'd give this another shot, just less frequently Today's listen: The Viscounts - Harlem Nocturne The Viscounts were a New Jersey instrumental band who secured their status as a footnote in pop history by charting twice with the same song. Their version of "Harlem Nocturne" reached the Hot 100 in 1959, and the Top 40 in 1966. The recording is moody and atmospheric, like a sleazier cousin to the Peter Gunn theme. The bass prowls, the guitar spreads like fog, and the sax is downright lasciv
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: After a year and a half, I have finished the Kiryu Saga. Played them in between …
entry.content: After a year and a half, I have finished the Kiryu Saga. Played them in between other things. My rank, in order: >0 >5 >1 >6 >4 >2 >3 Already had played Judgement and its sequel, and 7 because it can be played alone. Can't wait for Stranger Than Heaven. Guess I'll play 8 or Gaiden next. I like playing jumping around.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: wtf this is actually a really good game
entry.content: wtf this is actually a really good game
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /o/ Auto: When welding in new sheet metal at certain parts of the car the German inspectio…
entry.content: When welding in new sheet metal at certain parts of the car the German inspection authorities demand the following: 1) There has to be an overlap (no butt welding) 2) Spot welding (no continuous seams) How the fuck do I protect my car against future rust issues then? Water will get in at the points where there is no seam and it will sit right inbetween the 2 sheets which overlap. A Weld-Thru Primer won't do the trick, will it? Maybe delay the issue a bit. What about using body solder? There is a
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Pillar of the Western Civilization
entry.content: >Iliad >Trojan War starts because a whore (Helen) and 2 simps (Menelaus and Paris) >Odyssey >Achaean version of "Moses' 40 years in the dessert", but in the sea >only Odysseus survives, forget about his men (brothers in Ares) >he's now a pathetic man Perhaps the Western Civilization deserves to fall for being based in simpism and female-coded drama. Christopher Nolan is a based accelerationist, he is the Avatar of the 13th Olympian God, Momus the 'Exiled One'.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /b/ Random: >on the intercom Rosie tells me to come >she didn’t have a daughter but she did …
entry.content: >on the intercom Rosie tells me to come >she didn’t have a daughter but she did have a son >"the lift doesn’t work, run up the stairs and come" >"if you don’t quick you are not gonna know your son" >I grab a bunch of roses and started to run >two months later >"come and get your son" >"I don’t want you baby to come and tie me down" >"you are old, and I am young" >"while I am young I wanna have some fun"
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /int/ International: How does your populace view your military as well as veterans?
entry.content: I can sympathize with veterans and acknowledge the role that the military has played in providing careers and uprooting many from poverty. However I find the weak morality of the US government to be a source of shame to the country. Why should so many be sacrificed in chess game that those who are most impacted did not consent to play?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8376 Cock Fucking Edition Previous Thread: >>84147911 F-…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8376 Cock Fucking Edition Previous Thread: >>84147911 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profi
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Any mechanic anons in here?
entry.content: Got my rotors, wheel bearings and brake pads replaced on the rear wheels. I’m now hearing a metal grinding noise only when turning right and applying the brakes. No noise in any other situation. What could be the possible cause?
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.content: Why would anyone pay for Brave Origin when you can just; >[HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Polic ies\BraveSoftware\Brave] >"BraveVPNDisabled"=dword:00000001 >"BraveWalletDisabled"=dword:000000 01 >"BraveAIChatEnabled"=dword:0000000 0 >"BraveRewardsDisabled"=dword:00000 001 >"BraveTalkDisabled"=dword:00000001 >"BraveNewsDisabled"=dword:00000001 >"BraveWebDiscoveryEnabled"=dword:0 0000000 >"BraveP3AEnabled"=dword:00000000 >"BraveStatsPingEnabled"=dword:0000 0000 >"BraveWaybackMachineEnabled"=dword :00

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: My uncle died.
entry.content: My uncle was an English sailor, he sailed all across the caribbean coast and seeded his wild oats. died and he bequeathed me his possessions. One of them was an interesting book. Might I dare the devil and open it?
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Github star history
entry.content: Why did Github remove star history? Now you cannot view the history of how a repository gained its stars unless you are the owner or a collaborator. Right now there are so many AI slop projects with tens of thousands of fake stars. Is Github trying to keep this a secret? I do not understand this. For example: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView Totally fake project. 81k stars (obviously fake stars). But it doesn't work at all. What's the point?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Frodo, the Dark Lord's eyes are upon Lothlórien. Do you think I look fat in thi…
entry.content: >Frodo, the Dark Lord's eyes are upon Lothlórien. Do you think I look fat in this dress? I don't want Hal-, I mean, Sauron to think that he dodged an arrowand forced me to downgrade. I mean, Celeborn is wise and all, but the guy can't read the fucking room for the life of him. You saw how he was going on and on about much desiring to speak with Gandalf when the dude was clearly dead and you mortal pussies were obviously crying over him? Everyone was so embarrassed they didn't even want to answer
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Half-Life 2: Episode One
entry.content: What are your thoughts on Half-Life 2: Episode One? I believe it is mildly underappreciated. Sure, it doesn't have as much to chew on as the base game or Episode Two, but the things it does add are great; additionally, the combat sections were memorable, especially the dark areas where having to conserve your suit energy meant life or death.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /int/ International: Is globalization making it so everyone in the world pays around the same for eve…
entry.content: Is globalization making it so everyone in the world pays around the same for everything? It used to be 20 years ago i could go to southern europe and everything would be 100% cheaper than here but the food prices in stores last time i was in milan were higher than in germany. Is this also the case for secondies like balkans and turkey aswell?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /int/ International: hundreds of Germans go here to commit suicide every year
entry.content: i dont even know why but several thousands germans go to Sweden,Norway or Finland every year by car to get lost in the wilderness or simply to die. Local autorohies spend millions of dollars to find lost german tourists and mobilize thousands of helpers. I dont think that is okay. Germany should PAY UP. Or they should just ban germans from entering their countries in the first place.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Man becomes a Chad after quitting 4chan's shilled diets
entry.content: Notice how the shills here want you to cut off carbs completely and only feast on meat and protein. Carnivore and keto diets are shilled so hard even the US govt changed the pyramid to boost sales. Fasting is also a right wing scam to get you used to the incoming famines and also keep food prices down by lowering demand. You have to be an absolute retard to intentionally starve yourself. The anti carb shills will never be able to defend against such criticism. They are also unable to explain how

entry.title: /mu/ Music: what exactly happened to post punk in the late 80's-90's? it's like is overlooke…
entry.content: what exactly happened to post punk in the late 80's-90's? it's like is overlooked until the early 00's post punk revival. thoughts? i can stillt hink about post punk oriented names during that era like the ex or dog faced hermans but still its like it was put in parenthesis? on the other hand you can see how post punk elements were included in indie (eg, pavement's slanted and enchanted)

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: the new "azstarys" has been a disaster
entry.content: today is day 4. my brain is fried, this stimulant saps resources and then leaves me as a wreck once it wears off. i went to bed at 7 PM yesterday. more importantly, it seems to have severely damaged nerves/telemetry readings responsible for my urinary tract. i can urinate, but the "urge sensor" is shot. a few drops of pee feels like an emergency. i have not soiled myself thankfully. about 30% of my cognitive capacity is constantly allocated to the urge to pee. this is not good. not good at all.
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: You walk out of your apartment building and into the heavy rain. A homeless youn…
entry.content: You walk out of your apartment building and into the heavy rain. A homeless young man (pic related) is sitting on the sidewalk right outside, his back against the brick wall. You had been seeing him there a lot for the past month. He's barefoot and his clothes are soaked through. As you step past him, he looks up and asks you if you want to sign up for MAID with him. He tells you that they only accept applicants who are paired with a companion, and he says he somehow thinks that person has to be
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /b/ Random: I dont like pets they're smelly
entry.content: I can get something low matinence like a fish. But cats and dogs are a lot of effort and hinder productivity. It's actually a bit of a deal breaker for me in relationships too. No I don't want these furry homunculus looking at us well we forneicate. No I don't want to bring Little Bartholomew for a walk 3 times a day. No I don't want my cat to claw at me and be judging my actions when im pacing, cleaning, or playing music in the house. The energy they bring isn't good for me, our ideals don't al
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random
